nasb.text: He measured the porch of the gate, eight cubits; and its side pillars, two cubits. And the porch of the gate was faced inward.

esv.text: Then he measured the vestibule of the gateway, eight cubits; and its jambs, two cubits; and the vestibule of the gate was at the inner end.

cnv.text: 門廊深四公尺；牆柱厚一公尺；門廊是朝向殿內的。

ccb.text: 连墙柱在内共四点二米宽，墙柱宽一点零五米。
